channel.title: Tech News Radio
channel.description: 毎朝10分で最新テックニュースをAIがお届け
channel.itunes:author: Studio Machikita

item.title: Tech News Radio - 2026-03-29
item.description:
# Tech News Radio Show Notes - #022 (2026-03-29)
## エピソード情報 - **エピソード**: #022 - **日付**: 2026-03-29 - **尺**: 約 12 分
## 免責事項 当番組の内容は各情報源の要約です。正確な情報は必ず下記の原文リンクよりご確認ください。誤りがある場合はお知らせください。
## 出典リンク一覧 ### 本日のトップニュース - [The first 40 months of the AI era](https://lzon.ca/posts/other/thoughts-ai-era/) - [AI overly affirms users asking for personal advice](https://news.stanford.edu/stories/2026/03/ai-advice-sycophantic-models-research) - [AI overly affirms users asking for personal advice](https://techcrunch.com/2026/03/28/stanford-study-outlines-dangers-of-asking-ai-chatbots-for-personal-advice/) - [I Built an Open-World Engine for the N64 [video]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lXxmIw9axWw)
### 注目の深掘り - [GitHub - J-x-Z/cocoa-way: Native macOS Wayland Compositor written in Rust using Smithay. Experience seamless Linux app streaming on macOS without XQuartz.](https://github.com/J-x-Z/cocoa-way)
### 小ネタ・その他 - [Linux is an interpreter](https://astrid.tech/2026/03/28/0/linux-is-an-interpreter/) - [Detecting file changes on macOS with kqueue — Vegard Stikbakke](https://www.vegardstikbakke.com/kqueue/)
item.itunes:title: Tech News Radio - 2026-03-29
item.itunes:summary:
# Tech News Radio Show Notes - #022 (2026-03-29)
## エピソード情報 - **エピソード**: #022 - **日付**: 2026-03-29 - **尺**: 約 12 分
## 免責事項 当番組の内容は各情報源の要約です。正確な情報は必ず下記の原文リンクよりご確認ください。誤りがある場合はお知らせください。
## 出典リンク一覧 ### 本日のトップニュース - [The first 40 months of the AI era](https://lzon.ca/posts/other/thoughts-ai-era/) - [AI overly affirms users asking for personal advice](https://news.stanford.edu/stories/2026/03/ai-advice-sycophantic-models-research) - [AI overly affirms users asking for personal advice](https://techcrunch.com/2026/03/28/stanford-study-outlines-dangers-of-asking-ai-chatbots-for-personal-advice/) - [I Built an Open-World Engine for the N64 [video]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lXxmIw9axWw)
### 注目の深掘り - [GitHub - J-x-Z/cocoa-way: Native macOS Wayland Compositor written in Rust using Smithay. Experience seamless Linux app streaming on macOS without XQuartz.](https://github.com/J-x-Z/cocoa-way)
### 小ネタ・その他 - [Linux is an interpreter](https://astrid.tech/2026/03/28/0/linux-is-an-interpreter/) - [Detecting file changes on macOS with kqueue — Vegard Stikbakke](https://www.vegardstikbakke.com/kqueue/)

item.title: Tech News Radio - 2026-03-28
item.description:
# Tech News Radio Show Notes - #021 (2026-03-28)
## エピソード情報 - **エピソード**: #021 - **日付**: 2026-03-28 - **尺**: 約 13 分
## 免責事項 当番組の内容は各情報源の要約です。正確な情報は必ず下記の原文リンクよりご確認ください。誤りがある場合はお知らせください。
## 出典リンク一覧 ### 本日のトップニュース - [Waymo’s skyrocketing ridership in one chart](https://techcrunch.com/2026/03/27/waymo-skyrocketing-ridership-in-one-chart/) - [Memory chip giant SK hynix could help end ‘RAMmageddon’ with blockbuster US IPO](https://techcrunch.com/2026/03/27/memory-chip-giant-sk-hynix-could-help-end-rammageddon-with-blockbuster-us-ipo/) - [Telnyx package compromised on PyPI](https://telnyx.com/resources/telnyx-python-sdk-supply-chain-security-notice-march-2026)
### 注目の深掘り - [Embracing Bayesian methods in clinical trials](https://jamanetwork.com/journals/jama/fullarticle/2847011)
### 小ネタ・その他 - [GitHub - davidmonterocrespo24/velxio: Emulate Arduino, ESP32 & Raspberry Pi. in your browser. Write code, compile, and run on 19 real boards — Arduino Uno, ESP32, ESP32-C3, Raspberry Pi Pico, Raspberry Pi 3, and more. No hardware, no cloud, no limits.. Discord: https://discord.gg/rCScB9cG](https://github.com/davidmonterocrespo24/velxio) - [Building FireStriker: Why I'm Making Civic Tech Free](https://firestriker.org/blog/building-firestriker-why-im-making-civic-tech-free)
item.itunes:title: Tech News Radio - 2026-03-28
item.itunes:summary:
# Tech News Radio Show Notes - #021 (2026-03-28)
## エピソード情報 - **エピソード**: #021 - **日付**: 2026-03-28 - **尺**: 約 13 分
## 免責事項 当番組の内容は各情報源の要約です。正確な情報は必ず下記の原文リンクよりご確認ください。誤りがある場合はお知らせください。
## 出典リンク一覧 ### 本日のトップニュース - [Waymo’s skyrocketing ridership in one chart](https://techcrunch.com/2026/03/27/waymo-skyrocketing-ridership-in-one-chart/) - [Memory chip giant SK hynix could help end ‘RAMmageddon’ with blockbuster US IPO](https://techcrunch.com/2026/03/27/memory-chip-giant-sk-hynix-could-help-end-rammageddon-with-blockbuster-us-ipo/) - [Telnyx package compromised on PyPI](https://telnyx.com/resources/telnyx-python-sdk-supply-chain-security-notice-march-2026)
### 注目の深掘り - [Embracing Bayesian methods in clinical trials](https://jamanetwork.com/journals/jama/fullarticle/2847011)
### 小ネタ・その他 - [GitHub - davidmonterocrespo24/velxio: Emulate Arduino, ESP32 & Raspberry Pi. in your browser. Write code, compile, and run on 19 real boards — Arduino Uno, ESP32, ESP32-C3, Raspberry Pi Pico, Raspberry Pi 3, and more. No hardware, no cloud, no limits.. Discord: https://discord.gg/rCScB9cG](https://github.com/davidmonterocrespo24/velxio) - [Building FireStriker: Why I'm Making Civic Tech Free](https://firestriker.org/blog/building-firestriker-why-im-making-civic-tech-free)

item.title: Tech News Radio - 2026-03-27
item.description:
# Tech News Radio Show Notes - #020 (2026-03-27)
## エピソード情報 - **エピソード**: #020 - **日付**: 2026-03-27 - **尺**: 約 12 分
## 免責事項 当番組の内容は各情報源の要約です。正確な情報は必ず下記の原文リンクよりご確認ください。誤りがある場合はお知らせください。
## 出典リンク一覧 ### 本日のトップニュース - [My minute-by-minute response to the LiteLLM malware attack](https://futuresearch.ai/blog/litellm-attack-transcript/) - [Chats where you truly own your data.](https://colibri.social/) - [OpenTelemetry Profiles Enters Public Alpha](https://opentelemetry.io/blog/2026/profiles-alpha/)
### 注目の深掘り - [GitHub - russellromney/turbolite: SQLite VFS with sub-50ms cold queries from S3 + page-level compression and encryption](https://github.com/russellromney/turbolite)
### 小ネタ・その他 - [How much precision can you squeeze out of a table?](https://www.johndcook.com/blog/2026/03/26/table-precision/) - [CERN to host Europe’s flagship open access publishing platform](https://home.cern/news/news/cern/cern-host-europes-flagship-open-access-publishing-platform)
item.itunes:title: Tech News Radio - 2026-03-27

item.title: Tech News Radio - 2026-03-26
item.description:
# Tech News Radio Show Notes - #019 (2026-03-26)
## エピソード情報 - **エピソード**: #019 - **日付**: 2026-03-26 - **尺**: 約 13 分
## 免責事項 当番組の内容は各情報源の要約です。正確な情報は必ず下記の原文リンクよりご確認ください。誤りがある場合はお知らせください。
## 出典リンク一覧 ### 本日のトップニュース - [ARC-AGI-3](https://arcprize.org/arc-agi/3) - [TurboQuant: Redefining AI efficiency with extreme compression](https://research.google/blog/turboquant-redefining-ai-efficiency-with-extreme-compression/) - [TurboQuant: Redefining AI efficiency with extreme compression](https://techcrunch.com/2026/03/25/google-turboquant-ai-memory-compression-silicon-valley-pied-piper/) - [Quantization from the ground up | ngrok blog](https://ngrok.com/blog/quantization)
### 注目の深掘り - [Ensu - Ente's Local LLM app](https://ente.com/blog/ensu/)
### 小ネタ・その他 - [Updates to GitHub Copilot interaction data usage policy](https://github.blog/news-insights/company-news/updates-to-github-copilot-interaction-data-usage-policy/) - [FreeCAD Version 1.1 Released](https://blog.freecad.org/2026/03/25/freecad-version-1-1-released/)

item.title: Tech News Radio - 2026-03-25
item.description:
# Tech News Radio Show Notes - #018 (2026-03-25)
## エピソード情報 - **エピソード**: #018 - **日付**: 2026-03-25 - **尺**: 約 12 分
## 免責事項 当番組の内容は各情報源の要約です。正確な情報は必ず下記の原文リンクよりご確認ください。誤りがある場合はお知らせください。
## 出典リンク一覧 ### 本日のトップニュース - [Announcing Arm AGI CPU: The silicon foundation for the agentic AI cloud era](https://newsroom.arm.com/blog/introducing-arm-agi-cpu) - [Announcing Arm AGI CPU: The silicon foundation for the agentic AI cloud era](https://sbcwiki.com/docs/soc-manufacturers/arm/arm-silicon/) - [Welcome to FastMCP - FastMCP](https://gofastmcp.com/getting-started/welcome) - [Anthropic hands Claude Code more control, but keeps it on a leash](https://techcrunch.com/2026/03/24/anthropic-hands-claude-code-more-control-but-keeps-it-on-a-leash/) - [Anthropic hands Claude Code more control, but keeps it on a leash](https://zenn.dev/sunagaku/articles/claude-code-usage-mindset)
### 注目の深掘り - [GitHub - ssrajadh/sentrysearch: Semantic search over videos using Gemini Embedding 2.](https://github.com/ssrajadh/sentrysearch)
### 小ネタ・その他 - [GitHub - t8/hypura: Run models too big for your Mac's memory](https://github.com/t8/hypura) - [Disruption with some GitHub services](https://www.githubstatus.com/incidents/kp06czybl7dw)
item.itunes:title: Tech News Radio - 2026-03-25

item.title: Tech News Radio - 2026-03-24
item.description:
# Tech News Radio Show Notes - #017 (2026-03-24)
## エピソード情報 - **エピソード**: #017 - **日付**: 2026-03-24 - **尺**: 約 13 分
## 免責事項 当番組の内容は各情報源の要約です。正確な情報は必ず下記の原文リンクよりご確認ください。誤りがある場合はお知らせください。
## 出典リンク一覧 ### 本日のトップニュース - [BIO: The Bao I/O Coprocessor « bunnie's blog](https://www.bunniestudios.com/blog/2026/bio-the-bao-i-o-coprocessor/) - [Designing AI for Disruptive Science](https://www.asimov.press/p/ai-science) - [Designing AI for Disruptive Science](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.19782) - [How I Built an AI Receptionist for a Luxury Mechanic Shop - Part 1](https://www.itsthatlady.dev/blog/building-an-ai-receptionist-for-my-brother/)
### 注目の深掘り - [finding all regex matches has always been O(n²). even in the engines built to prevent it | ian erik varatalu](https://iev.ee/blog/the-quadratic-problem-nobody-fixed/)
### 小ネタ・その他 - [An Incoherent Rust](https://www.boxyuwu.blog/posts/an-incoherent-rust/) - [Autoresearch on an old research idea](https://ykumar.me/blog/eclip-autoresearch/)
item.itunes:title: Tech News Radio - 2026-03-24

### 注目の深掘り - [finding all regex matches has always been O(n²). even in the engines built to prevent it | ian erik varatalu](https://iev.ee/blog/the-quadratic-problem-nobody-fixed/)

item.title: Tech News Radio - 2026-03-23
item.description:
# Tech News Radio Show Notes - #016 (2026-03-23)
## エピソード情報 - **エピソード**: #016 - **日付**: 2026-03-23 - **尺**: 約 14 分
## 免責事項 当番組の内容は各情報源の要約です。正確な情報は必ず下記の原文リンクよりご確認ください。誤りがある場合はお知らせください。
## 出典リンク一覧 ### 本日のトップニュース - [Project NOMAD - Knowledge That Never Goes Offline](https://www.projectnomad.us) - [LLMs predict my coffee](https://dynomight.net/coffee/) - [GitHub - danveloper/flash-moe: Running a big model on a small laptop](https://github.com/danveloper/flash-moe)
### 注目の深掘り - [Building an FPGA 3dfx Voodoo with Modern RTL Tools](https://noquiche.fyi/voodoo)
### 小ネタ・その他 - [The gold standard of optimization: A look under the hood of RollerCoaster Tycoon](https://larstofus.com/2026/03/22/the-gold-standard-of-optimization-a-look-under-the-hood-of-rollercoaster-tycoon/) - [MAUI Avalonia Preview 1 - Avalonia UI](https://avaloniaui.net/blog/maui-avalonia-preview-1)

item.description:
# Tech News Radio Show Notes - #015 (2026-03-22)
## エピソード情報 - **エピソード**: #015 - **日付**: 2026-03-22 - **尺**: 約 14 分
## 免責事項 当番組の内容は各情報源の要約です。正確な情報は必ず下記の原文リンクよりご確認ください。誤りがある場合はお知らせください。
## 出典リンク一覧 ### 本日のトップニュース - [Thinking Fast, Slow, and Artificial: How AI Is Reshaping Human Reasoning](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=6097646) - [tinygrad: A simple and powerful neural network framework](https://tinygrad.org/#tinybox) - [Omnilingual MT: Machine Translation for 1,600 Languages | Research](https://ai.meta.com/research/publications/omnilingual-mt-machine-translation-for-1600-languages/?_fb_noscript=1)
### 注目の深掘り - [How ZJIT removes redundant object loads and stores](https://railsatscale.com/2026-03-18-how-zjit-removes-redundant-object-loads-and-stores/)

item.title: Tech News Radio - 2026-03-21
item.description:
# Tech News Radio Show Notes - #014 (2026-03-21)
## エピソード情報 - **エピソード**: #014 - **日付**: 2026-03-21 - **尺**: 約 14 分
## 免責事項 当番組の内容は各情報源の要約です。正確な情報は必ず下記の原文リンクよりご確認ください。誤りがある場合はお知らせください。
## 出典リンク一覧 ### 本日のトップニュース - [GitHub - MoonshotAI/Attention-Residuals](https://github.com/MoonshotAI/Attention-Residuals) - [OpenCode](https://opencode.ai/) - [France's aircraft carrier located in real time by Le Monde through fitness app](https://www.lemonde.fr/en/international/article/2026/03/20/stravaleaks-france-s-aircraft-carrier-located-in-real-time-by-le-monde-through-fitness-app_6751640_4.html)
### 注目の深掘り - [Our commitment to Windows quality](https://blogs.windows.com/windows-insider/2026/03/20/our-commitment-to-windows-quality/)
### 小ネタ・その他 - [VisiCalc reconstructed](https://zserge.com/posts/visicalc/) - [Show HN: I made an email app inspired by Arc browser](https://demo.define.app)

## 出典リンク一覧 ### 本日のトップニュース - [Astral to join OpenAI](https://astral.sh/blog/openai) - [10x Data Efficiency - NanoGPT Slowrun](https://qlabs.sh/10x) - [GitHub - KittenML/KittenTTS: State-of-the-art TTS model under 25MB 😻](https://github.com/KittenML/KittenTTS)
### 注目の深掘り - [From Oscilloscope to Wireshark](https://www.mattkeeter.com/blog/2022-08-11-udp/)
### 小ネタ・その他 - [Return of the Obra Dinn: spherical mapped dithering for a 1bpp first-person game](https://forums.tigsource.com/index.php?topic=40832.msg1363742#msg1363742) - [Employees had to restrain a dancing humanoid robot after it went wild at a California restaurant](https://techcrunch.com/2026/03/19/restaurant-dancing-robot-went-wild-hot-pot-cupertino-haidilao-agibot/)

## 出典リンク一覧 ### 本日のトップニュース - [Samsung bets this island startup can tame the grid with software and batteries](https://techcrunch.com/2026/03/16/samsung-bets-this-island-startup-can-tame-the-grid-with-software-and-batteries/) - [Chamber | Your AIOps Teammate for GPU Infrastructure](https://www.usechamber.io/) - [Investing in Infrastructure: Meta’s Renewed Commitment to jemalloc](https://engineering.fb.com/2026/03/02/data-infrastructure/investing-in-infrastructure-metas-renewed-commitment-to-jemalloc/)
### 注目の深掘り - [Language Model Teams as Distributed Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.12229)

## 免責事項 当番組の内容は各情報源の要約です。正確な情報は必ず下記の原文リンクよりご確認ください。誤りがある場合はお知らせください。
## 出典リンク一覧 ### 本日のトップニュース - [Making WebAssembly a first-class language on the Web](https://hacks.mozilla.org/2026/02/making-webassembly-a-first-class-language-on-the-web/) - [Temporal: The 9-year journey to fix time in JavaScript](https://bloomberg.github.io/js-blog/post/temporal/) - [Thinnings: Sublist Witnesses and de Bruijn Index Shift Clumping](https://www.philipzucker.com/thin1/)
### 注目の深掘り - [Are LLMs not getting better?](https://entropicthoughts.com/no-swe-bench-improvement)
### 小ネタ・その他 - [Returning to Rails in 2026](https://www.markround.com/blog/2026/03/05/returning-to-rails-in-2026/) - [I was interviewed by an AI bot for a job](https://www.theverge.com/featured-video/892850/i-was-interviewed-by-an-ai-bot-for-a-job)
item.itunes:title: Tech News Radio - 2026-03-12
item.itunes:summary:
# Tech News Radio Show Notes - #006 (2026-03-12)
## エピソード情報 - **エピソード**: #006 - **日付**: 2026-03-12 - **尺**: 約 10 分
## 免責事項 当番組の内容は各情報源の要約です。正確な情報は必ず下記の原文リンクよりご確認ください。誤りがある場合はお知らせください。
## 出典リンク一覧 ### 本日のトップニュース - [Making WebAssembly a first-class language on the Web](https://hacks.mozilla.org/2026/02/making-webassembly-a-first-class-language-on-the-web/) - [Temporal: The 9-year journey to fix time in JavaScript](https://bloomberg.github.io/js-blog/post/temporal/) - [Thinnings: Sublist Witnesses and de Bruijn Index Shift Clumping](https://www.philipzucker.com/thin1/)
### 注目の深掘り - [Are LLMs not getting better?](https://entropicthoughts.com/no-swe-bench-improvement)
### 小ネタ・その他 - [Returning to Rails in 2026](https://www.markround.com/blog/2026/03/05/returning-to-rails-in-2026/) - [I was interviewed by an AI bot for a job](https://www.theverge.com/featured-video/892850/i-was-interviewed-by-an-ai-bot-for-a-job)

# Tech News Radio Show Notes - #005 (2026-03-11)
## エピソード情報 - **エピソード**: #005 - **日付**: 2026-03-11 - **尺**: 約 10 分
## 免責事項 当番組の内容は各情報源の要約です。正確な情報は必ず下記の原文リンクよりご確認ください。誤りがある場合はお知らせください。
## 出典リンク一覧 ### 本日のトップニュース - [Yann LeCun raises $1B to build AI that understands the physical world](https://www.wired.com/story/yann-lecun-raises-dollar1-billion-to-build-ai-that-understands-the-physical-world/) - [Agents that run while I sleep](https://www.claudecodecamp.com/p/i-m-building-agents-that-run-while-i-sleep) - [TADA: Fast, Reliable Speech Generation Through Text-Acoustic Synchronization](https://www.hume.ai/blog/opensource-tada)
### 注目の深掘り - [AutoKernel: Autoresearch for GPU Kernels](https://github.com/RightNow-AI/autokernel)

## 出典リンク一覧 ### 本日のトップニュース - [Living human brain cells play DOOM on a CL1 [video]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yRV8fSw6HaE) - [Artificial-life: A simple (300 lines of code) reproduction of Computational Life](https://github.com/Rabrg/artificial-life) - [Neural Boids](https://campedersen.com/noid)
### 注目の深掘り - [Agent Safehouse – macOS-native sandboxing for local agents](https://agent-safehouse.dev/)
### 小ネタ・その他 - [We should revisit literate programming in the agent era](https://silly.business/blog/we-should-revisit-literate-programming-in-the-agent-era/) - [Pushing and Pulling: Three reactivity algorithms](https://jonathan-frere.com/posts/reactivity-algorithms/)

## 免責事項 当番組の内容は各情報源の要約です。正確な情報は必ず下記の原文リンクよりご確認ください。誤りがある場合はお知らせください。
## 出典リンク一覧 ### 本日のトップニュース - [A roadmap for AI, if anyone will listen](https://techcrunch.com/2026/03/07/a-roadmap-for-ai-if-anyone-will-listen/) - [SWE-CI: Evaluating Agent Capabilities in Maintaining Codebases via CI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.03823) - [How to run Qwen 3.5 locally](https://unsloth.ai/docs/models/qwen3.5)
### 注目の深掘り - [Show HN: Eyot, A programming language where the GPU is just another thread](https://cowleyforniastudios.com/2026/03/08/announcing-eyot/) - [Show HN: Eyot, A programming language where the GPU is just another thread](https://strlen.com/lobster/)
### 小ネタ・その他 - [A decade of Docker containers](https://cacm.acm.org/research/a-decade-of-docker-containers/) - [Notes on Writing WASM](https://notes.brooklynzelenka.com/Blog/Notes-on-Writing-Wasm)
